title: Bloomberg TV Schedule Entry
description: Represents a single program entry in the Bloomberg TV programming schedule, including show metadata, air times, hosts, and broadcast details for a specific regional lineup.

id.description: Unique identifier for the schedule entry

showId.description: Identifier for the associated show or series

title.description: Title of the program airing in this time slot

description.description: Description of the specific episode or program content
examples: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern cover the latest in global markets, economics, and geopolitics with interviews from industry leaders.

startTime.description: Scheduled start time in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset

endTime.description: Scheduled end time in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset

duration.description: Duration of the program in minutes

region.description: Regional broadcast this entry belongs to

hosts.description: List of hosts or anchors for the program

isLive.description: Whether this is a live broadcast or a replay/rerun

isReplay.description: Whether this is a replay of a previously aired program

showUrl.description: URL to the show page on Bloomberg
